# Assets

## Logo
- `logo-wordmark.svg` — full Strawberry Matcha wordmark (Lucide heart in strawberry-pink + gradient text). 400×64.
- `app-icon.svg` — square app icon variant (heart on cream→matcha gradient tile). 64×64.

## Generated by us, not extracted

The matcha codebase has **no logo file** — the wordmark is rendered live in JSX as a Lucide `<Heart>` next to text styled with the `.strawberry-matcha-gradient` utility (see `matcha/src/app/components/layout/navigation-bar.tsx` line ~73). The two SVGs above are static reproductions of that live mark using the same icon shape (Lucide `heart`), the same fill color (`#f472b6`), and the same brand gradient stops.

If you need the wordmark inline in HTML (matching the production rendering exactly), use the `<NavigationBar>` component or the markup pattern documented in `ui_kits/web/`. Use these SVGs only when an inline SVG asset is required (favicon, OG image, downloadable mark).

## Iconography

There are no PNG / SVG icon files to copy from the matcha codebase — it consumes Lucide icons as React components (`lucide-react`). For HTML previews and recreations in this design system, load Lucide via CDN:

```html
<script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest/dist/umd/lucide.js"></script>
<script>lucide.createIcons();</script>
```

Then use `<i data-lucide="heart"></i>`, `<i data-lucide="user"></i>`, etc. See `README.md` → ICONOGRAPHY for sizes and color rules.

## Imagery

The app does not ship background images, hero photography, or illustrations — the visual identity is built entirely from gradients, glass cards, and Lucide icons. Profile photos are user-uploaded and stored in object storage at runtime.
